details.text: Apart from your regular follow ups for this condition are you awaiting further: medical tests or investigations, test results or referral to hospital or surgery?

details.id: Please confirm medical disclosure in previous policy with TALIC?
details.text: Please confirm medical disclosure in previous policy with TALIC?

examples.corrected: Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), stomach ulcer, recurrent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, Pancreatitis/Pancreatic disorder or any gastrointestinal diseases or disorders
Have you fully recovered with no further symptoms, investigations, treatment or complications?
Deafness, Impaired hearing, speech problem, hoarseness of voice, difficult in swallowing, ear discharge or any other diseases or disorders of ears, nose or throat
